meaning: n.(謐暮ｲｸ逕ｨ)魍ｼ蜿益t.逕ｨ魍ｼ蜿牙初,逕ｨ魍ｼ蜿画黒闔ｷ
examples: The whale dived as the harpoon struck it.
When I pushed on the harpoon shaft the second time.
The old man rammed the harpoon down onto the shark's head it.
She had emergency surgery to remove the harpoon and is expected to make a full recovery.
In Coutinho's case, a neurosurgeon said the harpoon was millimeters away from vital arteries.
